{{Quote|It's a dirty job but I figure someone has to get rich doing it, and one way or the other, that someone is going to be me.|Zardra|<ref name="GG10">''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]''</ref>}}
'''Zardra''' was a tall [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] with long, dark hair.

==Biography==
[[File:Zardra.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Zardra the bounty hunter]]
Zardra had partnered herself with a fellow bounty hunter named [[Jodo Kast]], and together they decided to stake a claim on a bounty for two [[Spice/Legends|spice]]-jackers known as the [[Thig Brothers]]. They tracked the Thigs to a bistro called the [[Red Shadow]] on [[Taboon]]<ref name="AHF">{{StoryCite|story=A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}}</ref> in the [[Aweris system]]. Four [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] servants passed through carrying a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] known as [[Mageye]] on top of a palanquin. Mageye was en route to cut a deal with another Hutt named [[BolBol]]. The entourage made the mistake of getting into the middle of the firefight at the Red Shadows. Zardra and Jodo hemmed the Thig Brothers into a crossfire and opened fire on them. During the excitement, the Weequay servants dropped Mageye's litter, allowing the Hutt to slide down on top of Zardra. Unable to muscle her way out from beneath the Hutt on her own, Zardra shoved a gauge six [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] into his mouth, blowing him to bits. The death of Mageye soon reached the ears of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]. After losing favor with Jabba the Hutt, [[Gorm (cyborg)|Gorm the Dissolver]] accepted a 50,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] to bring Zardra to heel.

Circa [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Zardra tried to collect a 40,000-credit bounty posted by the Empire on [[Dharus]], a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Privateer/Legends|privateer]]. Understanding that Dharus could easily attack the [[Jesoni-class liner|''Jesoni''-class liner]] ''[[Culroon Minstrel]]'', Zardra boarded the ship. Dharus' intelligence was restricted to Imperial activities, and as such the pirate was unaware of the independent bounty hunter ambushing him — his contacts mistakenly believed Zardra to be a harmless Imperial aristocrat. Dharus and his crew attacked the ''Minstrel'' and, once they had boarded the ship, Zardra defeated them and captured Dharus.<ref name="GG9">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''</ref> The Empire gave Zardra the bounty.<ref name="PP">''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''</ref>

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Zardra was involved in the [[Escape from Tatooine|hunt]] for [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="TM" />

==Characteristics==
[[File:Zardrawithweapon.jpg|thumb|250px|Zardra was known to use a [[Force pike/Legends|force pike]].]]
Zardra was cautious and meticulous. She would analyze her target, the local populations, any escape routes and alternatives for each hunt. This sometimes led her to lose her target, but she preferred to be alive to try again rather than to stumble into a deadly situation.<ref name="SAV" />

It was noted that she had an "exotic, deadly scent."<ref name="OS">[[Otherspace (adventure)|''Otherspace'']]</ref>
